name: Qwen1.5-72B
license: Tongyi Qianwen LICENSE AGREEMENT (custom, free commercial use below usage threshold)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer, 80 layers, standard multi-head attention (SwiGLU, RMSNorm, attention QKV bias)
note: Gen-1.5 flagship with a uniform 32K context across the whole lineup, but at 72B this model uses standard multi-head attention, not GQA (config: num_key_value_heads = num_attention_heads = 64) — GQA in Qwen1.5 was applied only to the 32B/110B sizes.
tpsNote: Q4 weights (~48GB) exceed a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM; requires multi-GPU or CPU/disk offload.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real, released 2024-02-04 per official Qwen1.5 blog. All 8 base-model benchmark scores (mmlu 77.5, c-eval 84.1, gsm8k 79.5, math 34.1, humaneval 41.5, mbpp 53.4, bbh 65.5, cmmlu 83.5) confirmed verbatim on the blog. Raw config.json confirms num_hidden_layers=80 and num_attention_heads=64=num_key_value_heads=64 (standard MHA, not GQA). Independently corroborated via the later Qwen2 blog (2024-07-15), which states 'In Qwen1.5, only Qwen1.5-32B and Qwen1.5-110B adopted Group Query Attention (GQA)' — confirms the specific architectural claim that 72B uses plain MHA. Uniform 32K context and 12-language multilingual evaluation confirmed on blog. License (100M MAU commercial threshold) confirmed on HF LICENSE file.
